channel.title: The Family Table with Karen Bell
channel.description: Short conversations on culturally responsive psychiatric care, stigma, and caregiving, recorded from talks and grand rounds by Karen Bell, PMHNP-BC.

image.title: The Family Table with Karen Bell

item.title: Language Is Medicine
item.description: Why the words we choose in a medication visit carry treatment weight, drawn from a keynote on reducing stigma in underserved care.

item.title: Who Is at the Family Table
item.description: A grand rounds reflection on why treatment plans survive or die at home, and how to bring caregivers onto the same side as the plan.

item.title: Four Questions for a Busy Visit
item.description: The cultural formulation, folded into about four minutes: belief, stakeholders, what was already tried, and what counts as better.

item.title: Silence and Prayer, as History
item.description: How a community history of meeting illness with silence and prayer is context to understand, not a deficit to correct.
